zh.Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Tibbals於1523年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Benedict Dibble13歲，母親Joan Cullurd12歲。他和Joan Margaret Goodrich至少有4個兒子。他去世於1582年在英國薩默塞特享年59歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文包加瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Tibbals was born in 1523, in Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Benedict Dibble, was 13 and his mother, Joan Cullurd, was 12. He had at least 4 sons with Joan Margaret Goodrich. He died in 1582, in Somerset, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Paugasset, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Tibbalsが1523年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Benedict Dibbleは13歳，母Joan Cullurdは12歳であった。彼はJoan Margaret Goodrichとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1582年にイギリスソメルセトで59歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンプアウガセトにて埋葬された。

ko.Derby, New Haven County, Connecticut, US: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 파가세트
ko.lifeSummary: John Tibbals(이)가 1523년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Benedict Dibble(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Cullurd(은)는 12세였다. 그는 Joan Margaret Goodrich(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1582년 영국 서머세트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 파가세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Tibbals nasceu em 1523, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Benedict Dibble, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Joan Cullurd, tinha 12 anos. ru.Derby, New Haven County, Connecticut, US: паугассет, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Tibbals родился в 1523 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Benedict Dibble было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Cullurd, 12. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Joan Margaret Goodrich. Он умер в 1582 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности паугассет, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.
